uplink.description: multi-probe water-quality frame (fPort 2): turbidity, DO, ORP, pH
uplink._note: Synthetic WQS-LB frame, probe mask 0x39 (turbidity, dissolved oxygen, ORP, pH present); expected.data via this codec, cross-checked against the upstream decoder (oracle pH 7.0, turbidity 12.5, DO 8.5, ORP 250, water temp 25.0). Mapped to water.ph/turbidity/dissolvedOxygen/orp and water.temperature.current. Satisfies water-quality.
fPort 5 is firmware/band info, not a measurement.
